item.title: ACACIA
item.description:
DrugBank ID: db10451
DrugCentral: acacia
Synonymous :acacia | acacia ampliceps gum | acacia arabica | acacia circummarginata resin | acacia cufodontii resin | acacia dealbata gum | acacia fragilis gum | acacia gum | acacia leptopetala gum | acacia ligulata gum | acacia meisneri gum | acacia mucilage | acacia oxyosprion resin | acacia powder | acacia pruinocarpa gum | acacia rupestris resin | acacia salicina gum | acacia senegal | acacia senegal gum | acacia senegal gum extract | acacia senegal resin | acacia seyal | acacia spinosa resin | acacia verek resin | acacia victoriae gum | acacia volkii resin | acacia, spray-dried | acaciae gummi | arabic gum | arabic gum allergenic extract | gum acacia | gum arabic | gum arabic (acacia senegal) | gum arabic (acacia seyal) | gum senegal | gummi arabicum | kher resin | kordofan gum | mimosa senegal resin | plants and plant parts, gum, acacia or arabic acacia senegal | rfaudraksha resin | senegal gum | senegalia senegal resin | thorny acacia resin


Drug Sentece Context


Table 1. Analysis of context sentence of acacia gene in 1 abstracts.

pmid sentence
32839635 Molecular docking identified arabic acid from Acacia senegal and L-canavanine found in Sutherlandia frutescens as a potential inhibitor of SARS-CoV-2 3C-like main protease.
32891160 To investigate the potential efficacy of Acacia Senegal extract Gum Arabic (GA) supplementation as immunomodulatory and anti-inflammatory dietary intervention among newly diagnosed COVID 19 Sudanese patients.
